profession.name: graphic_designer
profession.description: Produces digital and print-ready visual artifacts under explicit technical, brand and delivery constraints.

job_types.description: Create one static social-media artwork from approved brand assets and supplied copy.
Remove a background by applying an explicitly approved digest-bound binary alpha mask without guessing segmentation.
Export an approved restricted SVG only after independently proving exact brand rules and pinned Inkscape delivery evidence.
Preflight and export one flat vector outlined poster only after independently proving bleed, safe area, PDF page boxes, resources, color spaces and security boundaries.

operators.description: Create a new document with an explicit canvas, unit and color profile.

rollback.strategy: discard isolated document

operators.description: Place an immutable approved asset while preserving declared geometric invariants.

rollback.strategy: remove inserted layer

operators.description: Create text layers from approved copy and explicit typography constraints.

rollback.strategy: restore document checkpoint

operators.description: Export a delivery raster using explicit dimensions, media type and color-profile requirements.

rollback.strategy: delete unaccepted output from isolated workspace
discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Resize the SVG canvas and viewBox using explicit positive pixel dimensions.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Create one explicitly identified Inkscape layer without changing existing elements.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Place a digest-bound approved PNG or restricted SVG asset as a data URI.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Create one direct SVG text element from approved copy and explicit typography.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Change only the declared fill property of one supported target.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Apply explicit translate, rotate and scale values to one declared target.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Align declared supported elements on one axis using measured geometry.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Distribute at least three declared supported elements on one axis.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Save the verified editable SVG into a new isolated output path.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output and restore the previous isolated checkpoint

operators.description: Export PNG, restricted SVG or PDF through an explicit media profile.
Apply an exact digest-bound binary alpha mask to a restricted RGBA PNG while preserving every foreground RGBA sample.

rollback.strategy: discard partial output from isolated workspace

operators.description: Import the cleaned PNG into pinned Inkscape and export a dimension-bound integration probe through the proof-bound adapter.

rollback.strategy: discard integration probe and editable staging document

operators.description: Reassess independent cleanup evidence and issue an Ed25519 Acceptance Certificate only for an accepted authorized trace.

rollback.strategy: discard unsigned bundle and certificate material

operators.description: Parse the immutable restricted SVG and prove exact canvas, palette, logo, typography and approved-copy rules from the digest-bound brand manifest.

rollback.strategy: discard validation report and isolated parse state

operators.description: Export the validated SVG through the pinned proof-bound Inkscape adapter and add verified IDAT-preserving sRGB delivery evidence.

rollback.strategy: discard raw export, normalized delivery and editable staging document

operators.description: Verify signed brand-export evidence, recompute independent validators and issue an Ed25519 Acceptance Certificate only for an accepted authorized trace.

rollback.strategy: discard unsigned bundle and certificate material

operators.description: Parse the immutable restricted SVG and independently measure bleed canvas, background coverage, safe area, palette, raster count, live text and path profile.

rollback.strategy: discard validation report and isolated parse state

operators.description: Export the accepted outlined vector SVG through pinned Inkscape and deterministically normalize PDF MediaBox, TrimBox, BleedBox and CropBox.

rollback.strategy: discard editable staging document, raw PDF and normalized PDF

operators.description: Verify signed execution evidence, independently reparse source SVG and delivery PDF, reassess the authorized trace and issue an Ed25519 Acceptance Certificate.

rollback.strategy: discard unsigned bundle and certificate material

implementation.strategy: decode exported artifact independently of design application
inspect file signature and decoder result
compare source asset bounds with placed layer transform and neighboring bounds
evaluate every rendered text bound against the declared safe-area polygon
calculate WCAG relative luminance from declared foreground and effective background regions
independently sample rendered pixels around glyph interiors and local backgrounds
extract and identify embedded ICC profile
compare exact root SVG and delivery PNG dimensions with the manifest
fail closed on undeclared elements, attributes, external resources or nested text
compare every declared fill against exact approved #rrggbb values
decode the embedded PNG and compare its SHA-256 with the approved logo
compare exact logo x, y, width and height with the manifest
measure logo bounds against all canvas edges
compare exact family, size, weight, coordinates, fill and anchor
compare exact decoded UTF-8 direct text with approved copy
inspect PNG structure and recompute IDAT-preserving sRGB normalization
compare sealed source SVG bytes before and after execution
verify pinned Inkscape identity and proof-bound adapter record bindings
allow only svg, g, rect and absolute M/L/H/V/Z path material with no effects or external references
compare width, height and viewBox with trim plus twice the declared bleed
measure the declared background rectangle against every bleed-canvas edge
bound every non-background rectangle and certified path inside bleed plus safe margin
compare every flat fill with exact lowercase approved #rrggbb values
independently prove the page contains no raster image XObjects
independently prove the page contains no PDF font resources or live SVG text
recompute the page tree and require exactly one poster page
recompute MediaBox, TrimBox, BleedBox and CropBox from the print specification
parse and compare the normalized PDF header version
decode page content and accept only explicitly allowed DeviceRGB or DeviceGray operators
reject soft masks, transparent ExtGState values and unsupported transparency groups
reject encryption, annotations, JavaScript, launch actions, AcroForm and embedded files
compare sealed source SVG bytes before and after execution
verify pinned Inkscape identity and proof-bound PDF export receipt bindings
